type: 学术论文方法 Pipeline 总览图（method overview figure）
goal: 生成一张可直接放进顶会论文 method 章节首页的 pipeline 总览图，要求极简、白底、几何精确、出版物级可读

canvas.background: pure white #FFFFFF or very light gray #FAFAFA
canvas.render_quality: vector-clean look, anti-aliased edges, sharp text

title_caption.caption: Overview of our RAG-based long-context QA pipeline: retrieve → rerank → assemble → reason.
title_caption.position: bottom-center, italic serif or compact sans-serif, smaller font size

input.label: Corpus + User Query
input.thumbnail: left tile: stack of document pages with token IDs; right snippet: a short English question string

items.name: Chunking & Indexing
items.icon_or_glyph: a grid of overlapping text windows with small hash icon on the side

items.name: Dense Retrieval
items.icon_or_glyph: a dense vector as an arrow from query embedding to top-K chunk dots

items.name: Cross-Encoder Rerank
items.icon_or_glyph: two horizontal bars (query, passage) and a small score meter

items.name: Context Assembly
items.icon_or_glyph: concatenated text blocks with a bracket labeled ≤ 32K

items.name: LLM Answering
items.icon_or_glyph: a decoder stack with an arrow to an answer string

output.label: Answer + Citations
output.thumbnail: a short answer paragraph with bracketed source IDs [1][3]

stage_block_style.size_per_stage: around 120px wide × 80px tall, all stages identical size
stage_block_style.fill: very light tint (e.g. #F1F5F9, #ECFEFF) — at most 2 different tints used to group stages by category
stage_block_style.title_text: stage name in bold sans-serif (Helvetica / Inter / Arial), 11-12pt, top-center inside block
stage_block_style.icon_position: centered inside block, takes ~50% of block height
stage_block_style.sub_label_text: sub-label in italic gray, below stage name

connectors.style: thin black arrows (1.2px) with simple triangle arrowheads
connectors.rule: horizontal flow left → right; small label above arrow only when carrying intermediate data type (e.g. 'top-20 chunk IDs', 'top-5 passages')

skip_connections.rule: if true, draw curved arrows that arc above the main flow with dashed style, label them 'skip' / 'residual'

loss_branch.label: L = L_cls + λ L_reg
loss_branch.rule: if enabled, draw a small dashed branch from output back to a 'Loss' box, formula in italic

color_legend.rule: if multiple stage tints are used, add a tiny legend bottom-right explaining each color group

must_keep: all stage blocks identical size and vertically aligned
white or near-white background, no gradient, no decoration
only sans-serif typography, no script / handwritten / display fonts
color palette ≤ 4 colors total, must remain readable in grayscale print
input thumbnail and output thumbnail same size, both have a thin border
arrows must not overlap stage blocks; labels must not collide with arrows
use English labels by default unless user requested otherwise
the figure should look like it came directly from a CVPR / NeurIPS PDF
avoid: 3D effects, drop shadows, gradients, glossy fills
Helvetica + serif mixed in same diagram
illustrative photo backgrounds inside stage blocks
stage blocks of unequal size or unaligned baselines
Chinese mixed with English labels unless explicitly bilingual
